case_title: EDDINGTON, NORMA et al VS HILLMAN, JIM et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EDDINGTON, NORMA EDDINGTON, KENT AS TO DEFENDANT HILLMAN, JIM THE VERDI CLUB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE VERDI CLUB

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDDINGTON, NORMA EDDINGTON, KENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILLMAN, JIM THE VERDI CLUB $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,548.00, JIM HILLMAN IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
